description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 29, 2025 at 3:16 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a SUV in a parking lot at 350 Pacific Avenue.  
 
The Waymo was traveling southbound in a parking lot at 350 Pacific Avenue when it slowed to a stop to yield to a SUV that was traveling 
northbound at the entrance of the parking lot. As the SUV proceeded to maneuver around the left of the Waymo AV, the left side of the 
SUV made contact with the rear left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
